commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Since they hastened to do evil, Paul called their path a ruinous and unhappy way. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: In the same way as Paul, prophecy upbraids the people with not understanding the law. "Destruction and misery are in their ways, and the way of peace have they not known."
